description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the building features a prominent front entryway with a covered porch and glass awning. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes a landscaped yard with a swimming pool, trees, and shrubs, as well as a driveway and several parked cars along the street. The rear of the house opens to a private garden area, while the sides are bordered by greenery and additional parking spaces. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with metal and wood accents visible in the fencing and entryway. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, fitting well within an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, and a covered entryway, surrounded by a fence and urban street elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a glass awning, large windows, fence, and several parked cars along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, garden, and additional parking, as well as the rear facade of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, pool, and a more private side of the house with fewer windows and a covered patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wall with minimal windows, dense greenery, and the side fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass awning, wide steps, and a covered porch integrated into the front facade.
